utcDay: Sunday UTC day begins Saturday 2026-06-20 at 20:00 EDT

sources.label: CWops Solid Copy No. 193, February 2026, W8WZ “Activating DC”
sources.notes: Article describes the LBJ 7-fer, the 4-fer fallback at Columbia Island Marina/picnic tables, and the 15-park Cheetah route completed on 2025-12-22.

sources.label: OpenStreetMap/Nominatim GeoJSON attempts
sources.notes: Physical park polygons were found for the main Mall/DC/VA stops. Trail GeoJSON is incomplete or low-confidence and still needs exact-position verification.

sources.label: Imported n-fer evidence from top activators

countingNotes: Count unique POTA entities on the Sunday UTC day, not local calendar day.
Fort McHenry at/after 20:00 EDT Saturday is part of the Sunday UTC rove count.
Trail references require operating within the POTA trail rule and on public land; imported n-fer data is evidence, not boundary proof.

The LBJ exact 7-fer operating point is approximate until confirmed on imagery/GPS: from Columbia Island Marina parking, walk to the LBJ stone monument, continue toward the Washington Monument, cross the parkway, and set up under a tree between the parkway and the Potomac as described by W8WZ.

timelineAssumptions.notes: Timeline is a planning model, not a schedule commitment. Use 45 minutes per activation stop for planning, with 30 minutes as the absolute floor if the day needs to compress.

primaryTimeline.movementFromPrior: Saturday route arrival; target on site by ~19:30
primaryTimeline.timelineNote: Opens the Sunday UTC day. Do not start before 20:00 EDT if the goal is Sunday UTC credit.
Sunday morning jackpot stop; fallback is four references if the exact 7-fer point cannot be found.
Adds FDR and National Mall if National Mall has not already been counted.
Short Mall walk; National Mall is already duplicate after FDR.
Cheetah threshold if Fort McHenry and LBJ verify as planned.
End of the W8WZ article-backed Mall sequence.
Useful Ostrich add-on if crowds and operating space cooperate.
Clean Ostrich finish if park/refuge access and antenna restrictions check out.

primaryTimeline.label: Fredericksburg hotel
primaryTimeline.timelineNote: Booked Sunday night anchor after the rove.

optionalTimelineAddOns.placement: between Washington Monument or Lincoln and Mason Neck
optionalTimelineAddOns.timelineImpact: Adds about 1h 35m before Mason Neck when including the activation and extra driving.
optionalTimelineAddOns.timelineNote: Useful high-confidence buffer for Ostrich only if exact public access and pace are excellent.

routeWaypoints.label: Fort McHenry
routeWaypoints.confidence: strong n-fer evidence; exact US-4582 position still needs field confirmation
routeWaypoints.notes: Use an on-grounds public operating position after the 20:00 EDT UTC rollover.

routeWaypoints.label: Foggy Bottom hotel
routeWaypoints.notes: Saturday night hotel and Sunday morning departure point.

routeWaypoints.label: Columbia Island Marina parking
routeWaypoints.notes: Drive here, then walk toward the exact LBJ 7-fer point.

routeWaypoints.label: LBJ exact 7-fer operating area
routeWaypoints.notes: W8WZ describes walking from the marina to the LBJ stone monument, continuing toward the Washington Monument, crossing the parkway, and setting up under a tree between the parkway and Potomac.

routeWaypoints.label: FDR Memorial
routeWaypoints.notes: Use a low-profile bench or tabletop operating spot.

routeWaypoints.label: MLK Memorial
routeWaypoints.notes: Use a low-profile bench operating spot.

routeWaypoints.label: Korean War Veterans Memorial
routeWaypoints.notes: W8WZ notes a successful low-profile AX1/kneeboard activation here.

routeWaypoints.label: Constitution Gardens
routeWaypoints.notes: Bench availability likely drives the exact operating point.

routeWaypoints.label: Vietnam Veterans Memorial
routeWaypoints.notes: Cheetah threshold if Fort and LBJ validate as planned.

routeWaypoints.label: Washington Monument
routeWaypoints.notes: W8WZ finished the Cheetah route here in late afternoon.

routeWaypoints.label: Lincoln Memorial
routeWaypoints.notes: W8WZ skipped this because it was crowded and lacked a nearby bench.

routeWaypoints.label: Mason Neck State Park / Mason Neck NWR
routeWaypoints.confidence: top-activator n-fer evidence; restrictions need confirmation
routeWaypoints.notes: Use only a compliant public operating position; verify refuge and state park antenna rules before relying on the 2-fer.

routeWaypoints.label: Dyke Marsh Wildlife Preserve
routeWaypoints.confidence: top-activator n-fer evidence; exact position needs confirmation
routeWaypoints.notes: Optional buffer stop near the Haul Road/Belle Haven access area.

operatingStops.timing: Saturday 2026-06-20, arrive ~19:30 EDT, activate at/after 20:00 EDT
operatingStops.name: Fort McHenry National Monument
operatingStops.evidence: Repeated imported top-activator records from KB3WAV and KC3RW show US-0928 + US-4581 + US-4567 + US-4582.
operatingStops.confidence: strong evidence; exact public operating position still needs confirmation

operatingStops.name: LBJ Memorial Grove exact 7-fer position
operatingStops.evidence: CWops/W8WZ article gives walking instructions and reference list; POTA API comments for trails emphasize exact-location verification.
operatingStops.confidence: high if exact tree/overlap point is found; fallback is 4-fer

operatingStops.name: Vietnam Veterans Memorial
operatingStops.confidence: article-backed; Cheetah threshold reached here if Fort and LBJ verify

operatingStops.name: Lincoln Memorial
operatingStops.confidence: good Ostrich add-on but crowd/bench availability risk; W8WZ skipped it

operatingStops.name: Mason Neck State Park / Elizabeth Hartwell Mason Neck NWR
operatingStops.confidence: imported n-fer evidence; verify refuge restrictions and park hours

operatingStops.name: Dyke Marsh Wildlife Preserve

routeModels.name: Cheetah baseline: Fort + LBJ + Mall through Vietnam
routeModels.totalLabel: about 8h 45m split across Saturday evening and Sunday, before food/parking variance
routeModels.notes: Cheetah threshold is reached at Vietnam if Fort McHenry 4-fer and LBJ 7-fer verify.

routeModels.name: Full W8WZ route plus Fort McHenry
routeModels.totalLabel: about 10h 45m split across Saturday evening and Sunday
routeModels.notes: This mirrors the article sequence and leaves room for one southbound add-on if the day is moving well.

routeModels.name: Ostrich stretch: full route + Lincoln + Mason Neck
routeModels.totalLabel: about 14h 10m split across Saturday evening and Sunday; stretch but plausible with disciplined 45-60 minute stops
routeModels.notes: Mason Neck should be before dusk; this model may need a morning start and no long social pause.

routeModels.name: Ostrich high-confidence buffer: add Dyke Marsh before Mason Neck
routeModels.totalLabel: about 15h 40m split across Saturday evening and Sunday; likely too heavy unless using shorter activations
routeModels.notes: Dyke Marsh adds margin but also pushes Mason Neck later; keep as backup unless exact access and pace are excellent.

mappedLegs.to: Washington Monument via Mall memorial sequence

openVerification: Confirm the exact LBJ 7-fer tree/overlap point against imagery or with a local activator before relying on all seven references.
Confirm Fort McHenry exact position for US-4582 in addition to US-0928, US-4581, and US-4567.
Confirm Mason Neck NWR operating restrictions: POTA cache says free-standing antennas only, no vegetation attachment, no off-trail operating, and no tables in parking areas.
Check closing/dusk times for Mason Neck if using it as the Ostrich add-on.
Decide whether the friend meetup happens inside the rove sequence or after the Cheetah count is already secure.
